T0041.title: Fake Provident Fund
T0041.definition: Refers to the fraudulent fabrication of housing provident fund data in a fake mobile app or the creation of fictitious employment relationships to help clients make supplementary housing fund contributions, ultimately aimed at defrauding consumer loans, payroll loans, and other personal credit products from banks and financial institutions.

references.title: Analysis of Housing Provident Fund Forgery Loan Fraud Techniques
